betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Gravity Gun§f is an advanced technology milestone in HBM's Nuclear Tech.

§ePrerequisites:§f
This quest unlocks after completing:
• §bIntegrated Circuit Boards§f - Advanced electronics
• §bSchrabidium§f - Exotic radioactive material
• §bWeapon Steel§f - Military-grade alloy

§eTask:§f Obtain §bredstone§f to demonstrate basic electronics knowledge.

§eContext:§f This milestone represents mastery of the components needed for advanced HBM devices. The redstone task confirms you understand circuit fundamentals.

§aTip:§f This unlocks further advanced quests in the progression tree.
